scripts.preview: npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && npx wrangler dev
scripts.deploy: npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.db:drop: npx wrangler d1 execute cf-git --remote --command='DROP TABLE IF EXISTS sessions; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS delivery_failures; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS notifications; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS follows; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS activities; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS objects; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS repo_refs; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS repo_trees; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS repo_commits; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS repos; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS actors;'
